infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FishGuide needs your location to show nearby fishing spots and conditions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FishGuide uses location for trip planning and nearby spot discovery.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FishGuide needs camera access to add photos to your profile and catch log.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FishGuide needs access to your photos for profile and catch log images.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FishGuide needs your location to show nearby fishing spots.

plugins.photosPermission: FishGuide needs access to your photos for profile and catch log images.
plugins.cameraPermission: FishGuide needs camera access to add photos to your profile and catch log.
